components.value: V, S, M (a drop of blood from each creature to be affected)

area.value: one willing living creature per 2 levels, no two of which may be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: The targets of this spell become angrier as they fight, the pain of their wounds fueling their strength. An affected creature gains a cumulative +2 morale bonus to Strength and a cumulative -1 penalty to AC for every 5 points of damage it takes (maximum +10 Strength, -5 AC) for the duration of the spell. These bonuses last until the spell expires or the target falls unconscious. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Companion: Orcs of Golarion.
